variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "Telecommunications" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "Telecommunications" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Create a comprehensive business observability dashboard for 
## Telecommunications | Broadband Signup Journey | Business Observability
**Focus:** Comprehensive dashboard with all available sections
**Data Signals:** 🔧 Services
---

3.title: 📈 Total Journey Volume
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count()

4.title: ✅ Journey Success Rate
4.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) 
| fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:2)

5.title: 💰 Total Revenue
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

6.title: ❌ Total Errors
6.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)

8.title: 📊 Journey Step Metrics
8.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize 
    OrdersInStep = count(), 
    SuccessRate = round((toDouble(countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2),
    AvgTimeInStep = avg(additionalfields.processingTime),
    ErrorsInStep = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true),
    ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), 
    by: {json.stepName} 
| sort OrdersInStep desc

9.title: 📈 Volume Over Time
9.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), failed = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), bins:30

10.title: 📊 Events by Step
10.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

12.title: 💼 Journey Events (Filtered)
12.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize total = count()

13.title: 💰 Revenue (Filtered)
13.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

14.title: 💵 Avg Order Value
14.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize avg = avg(additionalfields.orderTotal)

15.title: ⏱️ P90 Response Time
15.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize p90 = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90)

16.title: 📈 Events Over Time (Filtered)
16.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | makeTimeseries events = count(), bins:30

17.title: 📊 Events by Step (Filtered)
17.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

19.title: ⚡ Step Performance
19.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize Events = count(), AvgTime = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), by: {json.stepName} 
| sort Events desc

20.title: 📋 SLA Compliance (< 5s)
20.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count(), WithinSLA = countIf(additionalfields.processingTime < 5000), by: {json.stepName} | fieldsAdd ComplianceRate = (WithinSLA / TotalEvents) * 100

21.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
21.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

23.title: 📉 Error Rate Trend
23.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries {errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), total = count()}, bins:30 | fieldsAdd ErrorRate = (errors[] / total[]) * 100

24.title: ❌ Errors by Step
24.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter additionalfields.hasError == true | summarize ErrorCount = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort ErrorCount desc

25.title: 🐛 Error Details
25.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter additionalfields.hasError == true | summarize Occurrences = count(), by: {json.stepName, additionalfields.errorMessage} | sort Occurrences desc | limit 20

27.title: Requests
27.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

28.title: Requests - Success vs Failed
28.query:
timeseries total = sum(dt.service.request.count, default:0),
           failed = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count,default:0),
           nonempty: true, 
           filter: in(dt.smartscape.service, array($Service)) 
| fieldsAdd success = total[] -failed[]
| fields timeframe,
         interval,
         success,
         failed

29.title: Requests - Key Requests
29.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{endpoint.name},
           filter: endpoint.name != "NON_KEY_REQUESTS" and
           in(dt.entity.service, array($Service))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          endpoint.name,
          requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc         
| limit 100

31.title: Latency_p50
31.query:
timeseries latency_p50 = median(dt.service.request.response_time),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          latency_p50
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p50) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

32.title: Latency_p90
32.query:
timeseries latency_p90 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 90),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
          | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          latency_p90
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p90) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

33.title: Latency_p99
33.query:
timeseries latency_p99 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 99), 
           by:{dt.entity.service}
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          latency_p99
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p99) desc
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| limit 100

35.title: Failed Requests
35.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

36.title: 5xx Errors
36.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter:
           http.response.status_code >= 500 and http.response.status_code <= 599 
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| limit 100

37.title: 4xx Errors
37.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter:
           http.response.status_code >= 400 and http.response.status_code <= 499
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          errors
|filter in(service, array($Service))
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

39.title: CPU Usage %

40.title: Memory Used

41.title: GC Suspension Time
41.query:
timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.smartscape.process},
           filter: in(dt.smartscape.process, array($PGI))       
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.clr.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.smartscape.process},
           filter: in(dt.smartscape.process, array($PGI))
         ]
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.go.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.smartscape.process},
           filter: in(dt.smartscape.process, array($PGI)) 
         ]
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.smartscape.process},
           filter: in(dt.smartscape.process, array($PGI))
         ]
| lookup [smartscapeNodes PROCESS | fields id, name], sourceField:dt.smartscape.process, lookupField:id, fields:{name}
| fields timeframe, interval, process = name, gc_time
| sort arrayAvg(gc_time) desc
| limit 100

43.title: 💥 Top Exceptions
43.query:
fetch dt.davis.events, from:now()-24h
| filter event.kind == "ERROR_EVENT"
| summarize occurrences = count(), lastSeen = takeLast(timestamp), by: {event.name, dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort occurrences desc
| limit 15

44.title: 🚨 Active Dynatrace Intelligence Problems
44.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
| fields display_id, title, affected_entity_ids, event.start, event.status, management_zone
| sort event.start desc
| limit 10

45.title: 📋 Recent Log Errors
45.query:
fetch logs, from:now()-1h
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or loglevel == "WARN"
| fields timestamp, loglevel, content, dt.entity.service
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 20

47.content: *No additional business metrics detected in the journey payload. Start a journey simulation to populate dynamic tiles.*

49.title: 🗺️ Journey Activity Heatmap (Step × Hour)
49.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | fieldsAdd hour = formatTimestamp(timestamp, format: "HH") | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName, hour} | sort hour asc

51.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
51.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

52.title: 📊 Event Volume Distribution
52.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc

53.content:
---
🤖 *Dashboard generated by MCP Prompt-Driven Engine | 2026-03-16 | 53 tiles | Sections: executive_kpis, journey_overview, filtered_view, performance_sla, error_analysis, golden_signals_traffic, golden_signals_latency, golden_signals_errors, golden_signals_saturation, observability, customer_dynamic, geographic_view, trend_analysis*
